description: Audit the 'ORWOR TIMEOUT CHART' parameter definition in the VistA Kernel Parameter file. The Kernel Parameter Toolkit (XPAR) controls VistA application behavior. As a Clinical Application Coordinator (CAC) needing to verify timeout settings for CPRS, navigate to the Parameter Definition global ^XTV(8989.51) and locate the definition for 'ORWOR TIMEOUT CHART'. Ensure the entry's Zero-node (0) details, specifically the NAME and VALUE DATA TYPE fields, are displayed in the YDBGui dashboard.
